title: General Dynamics To Begin Work On $518M Global Logistics Contract To Support US Army CECOM
text: General Dynamics Corp (NYSE: GD) business unit General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT) has received a $518 million task order award from the U.S. Army Communications-Electronics Command (CECOM). The company will provide logistics, sustainment, and maintenance services for joint U.S. and coalition forces worldwide within the Army Field Support Brigade (AFSB) regions.

title: General Dynamics' (GD) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Lag
text: General Dynamics' (GD) fourth-quarter earnings are better than expected. The company continues to secure orders for different business segments.

title: Stocks Gain as Tech Rallies and Investors Await Fed Rate Decision
text: U.S. stocks are moving higher, led by tech, after another volatile trading day ahead of a Fed announcement about the future of monetary policy.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Tops Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: General Dynamics (GD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0.59% and 3.82%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: General Dynamics Clocks 1.8% Revenue Decline In Q4; Bottom-Line Tops Street View
text: General Dynamics Corp (NYSE: GD) reported a fourth-quarter FY21 revenue decline of 1.8% year-over-year to $10.29 billion, missing the consensus of $10.67 billion. Sales by segments: Aerospace $2.56 billion (+5.1% Y/Y), Marine Systems $2.87 billion (+0.5% Y/Y), Combat Systems $1.89 billion (-3.7% Y/Y) and Technologies $2.97 billion (-7.9% Y/Y).

title: Wednesday's Premarket: 5 S&P 500 Winners, 5 Losers
text: The three major U.S. equities indexes again closed lower on Tuesday. The Nasdaq closed 2.3% lower, the Dow Jones industrials dipped by 0.2% and the S&P 500 lost 1.2%.

title: General Dynamics stock falls after profit tops expectations but revenue surprisingly declines
text: Shares of General Dynamics Corp. GD, -0.54% fell 1.0% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the aerospace and defense company reported fourth-quarter profit that beat expectation but a surprise decline in revenue, as its aerospace and marine and combat systems business all missed revenue forecasts. Net income fell to $952 million, or $3.39 a share, from $1.00 billion, or $3.49 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: General Dynamics profit falls 5%
text: General Dynamics Corp on Wednesday posted a 5% fall in fourth-quarter profit, as labor shortages and supply chain issues hampered the defense contractor's deliveries.

title: General Dynamics, Biden's $770B Defense Bill, And Buffett's 10x Pretax Rule
